---
name: Marcos
surname: Anton
position: "Marketing Major and Digital Marketing Candidate"
email: manton@cpp.edu
github: Manton1234
output:
  vitae::latexcv:
    theme: classic
---

# Professional Summary

Marketing major at Cal Poly Pomona graduating in Summer 2026, focused on digital marketing strategy, campaign analytics, web analytics, and entrepreneurship.

# Education

Cal Poly Pomona, Business Marketing Degree with Marketing Minor, Summer 2026.

# Skills

Google Ads, digital marketing, e-commerce, SEO, paid search, GA4, campaign reporting, Quarto, GitHub, project management, vendor coordination, and team leadership.
